title: Premium CEO
sourceTitle: Premium CEO Reference Headshot Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium CEO-style executive headshot for user-owned portrait photo before premium CEO headshot transformation, preserving fictional adult founder in tailored dark suit and crisp white shirt, direct eye contact. Subject: fictional adult founder in tailored dark suit and crisp white shirt, direct eye contact keeps the same person from the uploaded photo while gaining powerful executive presence, direct eye contact, refined facial definition, and confident leadership expression. Scene: deep neutral studio background, sophisticated executive presence, realistic lighting creates the clean dark corporate studio environment with luxury editorial depth and restrained authority. Composition: Fixed 4:5 portrait composition: same face identity, direct eye contact, head-and-shoulders crop, perfectly tailored dark suit, crisp white shirt, clean elegant background, and strong center-safe executive framing. Signature Elements: Direct eye contact, dark tailored business suit, crisp white shirt, Rembrandt-style studio shadows, refined facial definition, dark elegant background, and powerful CEO presence. Style: Highly photorealistic premium corporate editorial headshot with ultra-detailed realism, polished leadership branding, sophisticated luxury presence, and 8K-level finish. Color Palette: Dark suit blacks and charcoals, crisp white shirt, warm natural skin tones, deep neutral background, and subtle premium highlight contrast. Lighting: Cinematic studio lighting with dramatic Rembrandt-style shadows, refined facial shaping, controlled catchlights, dark background falloff, and polished suit highlights. Camera: 4:5 executive portrait crop, realistic lens compression, sharp facial detail, natural skin texture, and clean professional framing. Materials: Tailored wool suit, crisp white cotton shirt, realistic skin texture, subtle hair detail, clean studio backdrop, and premium editorial retouching without plastic skin. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Preserve the uploaded identity when provided.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
